title: Use Codex Through the Anydocs MCP Server
description: A sample docs project written through actual MCP tool calls.

render.markdown:
# Use Codex Through the Anydocs MCP Server

This project was not produced by manually editing JSON. It was written through the local `@anydocs/mcp` server by calling `project_open`, `project_validate`, `page_update`, and `page_create` from an MCP client.

Recommended reading:

- [How Codex and Anydocs work together](/en/codex-workflow)
- [Connect the Anydocs MCP server in Codex](/en/connect-mcp-in-codex)
- [A developer simulation of building the site](/en/developer-simulation)
render.plainText: Use Codex Through the Anydocs MCP Server. This project was written through actual MCP tool calls instead of manual JSON editing.
